note: Retail monthly prices for fixed internet+TV packages, SI, captured 2026-07. Promo vs regular flagged. Illustrative where operator hides price behind a configurator. Prices include VAT (z DDV). Promo prices are 24-month (or shorter, noted) new-subscriber rates that revert to regular after the promo window; verify per address, as fixed-line pricing is availability- and technology-dependent (FTTH vs cable/DSL).

packages.name: Xplore TV mini
packages.notes: Entry Xplore TV tier. Promo is 24-month new-subscriber rate, reverts to 44.99 after. Time-shift limited to 1 month on this tier.

packages.name: Xplore TV maxi
packages.notes: Mid tier. Pickbox TV included. Time-shift 3 months. Promo reverts to 56.99 after 24 months.

packages.name: Xplore TV maxi+
packages.notes: DEMO PERSONA PACKAGE. Top Xplore TV tier: VOYO permanently included + 1 selectable premium service per month (Netflix, HBO Max, SkyShowtime, FilmBox+, etc). Unlimited time-shift at no extra cost. Promo 55.99 for 24 months reverts to regular 70.99. NOTE: a secondary source (siol/trojcek reseller) quoted regular ~67.99 earlier in 2026 and deeper time-limited promos (down to ~52 during 10.6-31.8.2026 47.89 percent action); treat 70.99 as the current official a1.si regular and 55.99 as the standing promo. Fixed telephony can be added for +2 EUR/mo.

bundles.name: A1 Komplet Basic
bundles.notes: 3play. Internet up to 1000/100, 100+ TV channels, unlimited mobile calls/SMS + unlimited data (throttled to 2/1 Mbps after 20GB). ~42 percent off over 24 months.

bundles.name: A1 Komplet Standard
bundles.notes: 3play. Same 1000/100 internet, 180+ TV channels, 3 months free time-shift, mobile 200GB before throttle. ~48 percent off over 24 months. VOYO included; Netflix/HBO Max/SkyShowtime free first 3 months for new customers.

bundles.name: A1 Komplet Custom
bundles.notes: Build-your-own: any mobile plan + any internet/TV combination, price computed in configurator. No fixed published price.

packages.name: EON LIGHT
packages.notes: Entry EON internet+TV. Includes telephony and promotional Arena Sport through Dec 2026. Promo 29.90 for 24 months reverts to 50.90.

packages.name: EON FULL
packages.tvChannels: 180+ (100+ HD), 10000+ video club titles, CineStar TV Premiere HD
packages.notes: Mid EON tier. Promo 34.90 for 24 months reverts to 60.90.

packages.name: EON PREMIUM
packages.notes: Top EON tier (marked PRILJUBLJENO/Popular). VOYO included + choice of HBO Max or SkyShowtime. 2x EON Smart Box. Promo 44.90 for 24 months reverts to 74.90.

bundles.name: EON LIGHT + ŠE VEČ
bundles.notes: 3play. Adds unlimited mobile (data/calls/SMS) to EON LIGHT. Promo 24 months.

bundles.name: EON FULL + ŠE VEČ
bundles.notes: 3play. EON FULL + unlimited mobile. Promo 24 months.

bundles.name: EON PREMIUM + ŠE VEČ
bundles.notes: 3play. EON PREMIUM + unlimited mobile, VOYO + HBO Max/SkyShowtime, 2x EON Smart Box. Promo 24 months. New subscribers get 100 EUR Telemach klub credit.

packages.name: NEO A
packages.notes: Entry NEO. Promo 32.99 requires 24-month commitment; for new subscribers WITH a mobile plan it holds 24 months, WITHOUT mobile only first 6 months (promo window 15.5-31.7.2026). Reverts to regular 49.00.

packages.name: NEO B
packages.notes: Mid NEO. Same 32.99 intro promo as NEO A (mobile-gated for full 24 months). Reverts to regular 58.00.

packages.name: NEO C
packages.tvChannels: 255+ (Mega HD), expanded video club (Pickbox, HBO, CineStar)
packages.notes: Top NEO. Same 32.99 intro promo (mobile-gated for full 24 months). Reverts to regular 63.00. Wi-Fi 6 modem.

bundles.name: NEO + mobilni paket (bundle discount)
bundles.notes: Telekom does not publish a single fixed 3play price; the 32.99 NEO promo IS the bundle mechanic - it only holds for the full 24 months when combined with a qualifying mobile plan. Add a mobile paket on top; combined price via telekom.si configurator.

packages.name: Oranžni Optimum (Optika)
packages.notes: Includes 1x mobile paket Oranžni Mini (T2 packages bundle mobile by default). Wi-Fi 6, T-2 Ščit, tv2go EU. Promo 29.99 reverts to 63.99. 12-month commitment.

packages.name: Oranžni Diamant HBO (Optika)
packages.notes: Includes 1x mobile paket Oranžni Maxi. HBO Max, 500GB cloud, 1 extra TV pack. Deep promo 29.99 reverts to steep 87.99 regular. 12-month commitment. (Historical ref: Diamant was ~78.99 in 2022.)

packages.name: Oranžni King (Optika)
packages.notes: Top T2 tier. Includes 2x mobile paket Oranžni Maxi, 2 extra TV packs, 1TB cloud. Symmetric gigabit. Promo 59.99 reverts to 99.99. 24-month commitment.

packages.name: T2 TV+NET (Optika)
packages.notes: Cheapest internet+TV with NO mobile. Promo 19.99 reverts to 41.99. 24-month commitment. Useful floor reference for TV+internet-only.

bundles.name: Oranžni King (4play: net+TV+fixed+2x mobile)
bundles.notes: T2's Oranžni tiers ARE the bundles - they include fixed telephony and 1-2 mobile SIMs by default, so the package price above already reflects 3play/4play. King = symmetric gig + 2 mobile SIMs.

dataQualityCaveats: All prices include VAT and are the advertised household consumer rates on official operator sites as of 2026-07-18.
Fixed-line pricing in SI is address- and technology-dependent (FTTH vs cable vs xDSL). FTTH speeds quoted; DSL variants are slower at similar price.
Promo prices are new-subscriber, commitment-gated (mostly 24 months; T2 Optimum/Diamant 12 months). They revert to the listed regular price after the promo window.

A1 Xplore TV maxi+: a1.si lists regular 70.99 / standing promo 55.99. Reseller aggregators (trojcek, siol) cited a lower regular (~67.99) and deeper time-limited actions (~52) earlier in 2026 - the official a1.si figures are used here; the persona's actual bill may differ if signed under an older/other promo.

Telekom NEO shows one headline promo (32.99) across all three tiers; the promo persistence for the full 24 months is gated on bundling a mobile plan - without mobile it lasts only ~6 months. Regular prices differ by tier (49/58/63).
Bundle rows for Telekom and A1-Custom are configurator-driven (no single fixed published price); values left null where the operator hides the number behind an address/plan selector.
Internet-only tiers (EON NET, etc) exist but were out of scope; this file covers internet+TV and multi-play only.
